query_title: Comedy Central Roast of Justin Bieber

recommendations.title: Ellen DeGeneres: Relatable
recommendations.overview: In her first special since 2003, Ellen revisits her road to stardom and details the heartfelt -- and hilarious -- lessons she's learned along the way.

recommendations.title: Comedy Central Roast of James Franco
recommendations.overview: It's James Franco's turn to step in to the celebrity hot seat for the latest installment of The Comedy Central Roast.

recommendations.title: Chris Rock: Selective Outrage
recommendations.overview: Chris Rock delivers an electric stand-up set on non-racist yoga pants, spoiling his kids, the Kardashians and his thoughts on the Will Smith fiasco.

recommendations.title: Not Another Teen Movie
recommendations.overview: On a bet, a gridiron hero at John Hughes High School sets out to turn a bespectacled plain Jane into a beautiful and popular prom queen in this outrageous send-up of the teen movies of the 1980s and '90s.

recommendations.title: The Devil's Advocate
recommendations.overview: Aspiring Florida defense lawyer Kevin Lomax accepts a job at a New York law firm. With the stakes getting higher every case, Kevin quickly learns that his boss has something far more evil planned.

recommendations.title: Home Alone
recommendations.overview: Eight-year-old Kevin McCallister makes the most of the situation after his family unwittingly leaves him behind when they go on Christmas vacation. When thieves try to break into his home, he puts up a fight like no other.

recommendations.title: Split
recommendations.overview: Though Kevin has evidenced 23 personalities to his trusted psychiatrist, Dr. Fletcher, there remains one still submerged who is set to materialize and dominate all the others. Compelled to abduct three teenage girls led by the willful, observant Case

recommendations.title: Kevin Hart: I'm a Grown Little Man
recommendations.overview: Fresh off the heels of appearing in movies like Superhero Movie and The 40 Year-Old Virgin, fast-talking comedian Kevin Hart stars in this live stand-up performance where he makes fun of everything and everybody - especially himself.

recommendations.title: Kevin Hart: Seriously Funny
recommendations.overview: Fresh off the heels of appearing in movies like Superhero Movie and The 40 Year-Old Virgin, fast-talking comedian Kevin Hart stars in his second live stand-up performance in Cleveland, Ohio, where he makes fun of everything and everybody - especially

recommendations.title: Wizards of Waverly Place: Wizard School
recommendations.overview: When Alex is caught using magic to clean her room she is forced to go to wizard school with Justin. Max and Jerry camp out on the terrace to prove their manhood.
